task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'High-Value Desktop Users' segment
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the segment name 'High-Value Desktop Users' in the Matomo segment selector, segment list, or segment editor.

task_completion.description: Verify the conditions for the 'High-Value Desktop Users' segment
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the segment editor for 'High-Value Desktop Users', look for two conditions joined by an 'AND' operator: 1) 'Device type' is equal to 'Desktop' (or 'desktop'), and 2) 'Actions' (or 'Number of actions') is greater than (>) '3'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Bounced Mobile Visitors' segment
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the segment name 'Bounced Mobile Visitors' in the Matomo segment selector, segment list, or segment editor.

task_completion.description: Verify the conditions for the 'Bounced Mobile Visitors' segment
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the segment editor for 'Bounced Mobile Visitors', look for two conditions joined by an 'AND' operator: 1) 'Device type' is equal to 'Smartphone' (or 'smartphone'), and 2) 'Actions' (or 'Number of actions') is equal to (== or is) '1'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both segments are visible to all users
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the segment editor for both segments, look for the 'Visible to' setting (usually a dropdown or radio button) and ensure it is set to 'All Users'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Matomo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Matomo web UI in a browser to create the segments, rather than executing API calls or scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify interaction with the genuine Matomo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must display the actual Matomo dashboard and segment editor, not a text editor, mock interface, or static HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI via database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots showing the agent using a MySQL client or terminal to directly insert segment records into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Matomo field name for 'Number of actions' is 'actions' (do not accept 'visitTotalActions'). The device type values should be lowercase 'desktop' and 'smartphone' respectively, per Matomo's device-detector library. Both segments must use the 'AND' logic between conditions. The visibility must be set to 'All Users' (which corresponds to enable_all_users=1 in the database).
